description: GitHub Project board fields are planning signals. Fast PR review and mergeability state is derived from native GitHub PR state.

board_owned_planning_signals.guidance: Use for slower planning questions such as readiness, routing evidence, roadmap grouping, dependencies, and explicit stale-exemption rationale. Routing evidence records the next decision or revisit surface; the stale-exemption reason remains a separate fact.

sources: branch protection or ruleset required contexts when exact required-check status is needed
derived_github_pr_signals.guidance: Display only. Do not maintain native PR review, check, conflict, or merge readiness state as separate board truth.

label_metadata.guidance: Use labels for portable classification across issues and PRs. Labels can suggest the likely area, but they are not routing evidence by themselves.

non_goals: manual mirror of native PR state
